goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should 'leave after 10:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park
Make sure you get phone number
